units.source_text: 1 總額包括名義⾦額353億美元及相關預期信貸損失準備2,100萬美元，乃與2024年出售加拿⼤銀⾏業務後撤銷確認貸款承諾及財務擔保有關。
units.translation_target_text: 1 Total includes a notional amount of US$35.3 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$21 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.
units.translation_en: 1 Total includes a notional amount of US$35.3 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$21 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 Total includes a notional amount of US$35.3 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$21 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.

units.source_text: 2 總額包括名義⾦額27億美元，乃與2024年出售阿根廷業務後撤銷確認貸款承諾及財務擔保有關。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Total includes a notional amount of US$2.7 billion related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Argentina operations in 2024.
units.translation_en: 2 Total includes a notional amount of US$2.7 billion related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Argentina operations in 2024.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Total includes a notional amount of US$2.7 billion related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Argentina operations in 2024.

units.source_text: 我們對須承擔信貸風險的所有⾦融⼯具進⾏信貸質素評估。⾦融⼯具的信貸質素是於某時間點對違責或然率的評估，⽽第⼀及第⼆級的釐定則根據
units.translation_target_text: We conduct credit quality assessments on all financial instruments that are subject to credit risk. The credit quality of a financial instrument is an assessment of the probability of default at a point in time, and Levels 1 and 2 are determined based on
units.translation_en: We conduct credit quality assessments on all financial instruments that are subject to credit risk. The credit quality of a financial instrument is an assessment of the probability of default at a point in time, and Levels 1 and 2 are determined based on

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: We conduct credit quality assessments on all financial instruments that are subject to credit risk. The credit quality of a financial instrument is an assessment of the probability of default at a point in time, and Levels 1 and 2 are determined based on

units.source_text: 信貸質素相對組合⼤部分項⽬⾸次確認入賬時轉差的程度⽽釐定。因此，對於非信貸已減值的⾦融⼯具，儘管信貸質素級別較低的⾦融⼯具在第⼆
units.translation_target_text: Credit quality is determined by the extent of slippage when most items in the portfolio are first recognized. Therefore, for non-credit-impaired financial instruments, although financial instruments with lower credit quality levels are
units.translation_en: Credit quality is determined by the extent of slippage when most items in the portfolio are first recognized. Therefore, for non-credit-impaired financial instruments, although financial instruments with lower credit quality levels are

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Credit quality is determined by the extent of slippage when most items in the portfolio are first recognized. Therefore, for non-credit-impaired financial instruments, although financial instruments with lower credit quality levels are

units.source_text: 級所佔的比例往往較⾼，信貸質素評估結果與第⼀及第⼆級之間並無直接關係。下表所述的五類信貸質素各⾃包括⼀系列涵蓋批發及個⼈貸款業務
units.translation_target_text: The proportion of credit ratings is often higher, and there is no direct relationship between the credit quality assessment results and the first and second ratings. Each of the five categories of credit quality described in the table below includes a range of services covering wholesale and personal lending businesses.
units.translation_en: The proportion of credit ratings is often higher, and there is no direct relationship between the credit quality assessment results and the first and second ratings. Each of the five categories of credit quality described in the table below includes a range of services covering wholesale and personal lending businesses.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The proportion of credit ratings is often higher, and there is no direct relationship between the credit quality assessment results and the first and second ratings. Each of the five categories of credit quality described in the table below includes a range of services covering wholesale and personal lending businesses.

units.source_text: 的精細內部信貸評級，以及由外界機構對債務證券所作的外界評級，詳情請參閱第139⾴的列表。
units.translation_target_text: sophisticated internal credit ratings, as well as external ratings of debt securities by external agencies, see the list on page 139 for details.
